acceptance_criteria.text: Use Browser use to step through the 10 requested custom-agent scenarios, fix confusing or broken behavior, deploy, and verify from the user's point of view.
proof: Browser use exercised the 10 scenarios on /dashboard/agents with clicks, typed prompts, and next-step inspection.
Local tests passed: 32 agent_builder tests and 35 agent_builder/openclaw_planner tests.
Frontend clean build from HEAD plus the AgentBlueprintsPage patch passed.
Server app and worker are running; curl -I http://localhost:8000 returned HTTP 200.
Final Telegram analytics scenario passed with create/test CTA and no clarification or unavailable state.
gaps: After the last narrow Telegram analytics fix, only the previously failing scenario was retested in browser; the full 10-scenario browser run was not repeated again.

known_gaps: No destructive data changes were made.
The proof used the currently authenticated in-app browser session.
